preFixReproduction.observed: Seven world labels were compressed into one narrow row between Mool and Chat, producing crowded text and undersized tap areas.

rootCause: The integrated dock kept all seven destinations in a single equal-width row and reduced typography instead of allowing the same dock surface to expand.
fix: The integrated dark dock now expands into a balanced 4+3 action grid while retaining Mool and Chat on the same surface. The root actions use 11 px labels and minimum 44 px tap height without a popup, duplicate navigation rail or swipe dependency.

exactReplay.layout: Social, Buy, Eat and Ride on row one; Book, Pay and Work on row two
